title: INCOME-BASED EFFICIENCY REBATES AND LOANS - 211info
text: EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD INCOME-BASED EFFICIENCY REBATES AND LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides efficiency products through a rebate; loan program upgrades may include heating systems, insulation, water leak repair assistance, and windows. Income-based efficiency rebates and loans are for homes with existing electric heating and water heating. 4200 Roosevelt Boulevard Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: -Must meet income limits for household size. Total household income includes gross income for all adults over 18, including roommates. Visit website for current income limits. -Documented qualifying income level for the previous month is required. -Only the qualifying account holder's primary residence may qualify for owner-occupied homes. For rentals, the tenant must be income qualified and be the current EWEB account holder. -Maximum aggregated income-based rebates are $8,000 per customer and $8,000 per residence over 10 years. Each individual product may have a limit as well. -Applications may be denied for closed accounts, abusive behavior toward EWEB, tampering with any EWEB property, or any evidence of fraud. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 685-7088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 685-7000 Main phone Main phone (541) 685-7088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the application or call for more information FEES: Varies by rebate; loans are 0% interest DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene, Leaburg, Springfield, Vida, and Walterville Services: Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Grants/Loans Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD
